'''dhapomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nymphology|nymphology]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-p-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nymphology|nymphology]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhapomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || dhæpemeth || dhæpemej || dhæpemesh || dhæpeme
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || dhapopomoth || dhapopomoj || dhapopomosh || dhapopomo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || dhapomoth || dhapomoj || dhapomosh || dhapomo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || dhapofmofth || dhapofmofj || dhapofmofsh || dhapofmof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || dhapomotho || dhapomojo || dhapomosho || dhapomoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || dhapomoth || dhapomoj || dhapomosh || dhapomo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || dhapomothol || dhapomojol || dhapomoshol || dhapomokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || dhapomoothotho || dhapomoojojo || dhapomooshosho || dhapomooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || dhapomothon || dhapomojon || dhapomoshon || dhapomokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || dhapomothooro || dhapomojooro || dhapomoshooro || dhapomokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
